title: taraxacum kiushianum
intro: Taraxacum kiushianum, also known as Japanese dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and improving liver function. Taraxacum kiushianum can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations like infusion, decoction, and tincture.
